projects.name: Risk Assessment of Cyberattacks Using Bayesian Network
projects.summary: Delivered data-driven strategies for prioritizing cybersecurity defenses.

projects.name: Numerical Simulation of a Two-Stage Rocket
projects.summary: This project simulates the vertical flight of a two-stage rocket by solving a system of ordinary differential equations (ODEs) numerically using scipy.integrate.solve ivp with the RK45 method.
